global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a clear focus on meal options and a strong call to action.
global.main_message: Quick meal options available for installation.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background that fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold, white text prominently displayed at the center, conveying the main offer of the ad.

elements.label: Meal selection
elements.description: Three rectangular placeholders representing meal options, arranged horizontally in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Meal option
elements.description: A rectangular shape representing a meal option, positioned to the left of the app screenshot.

elements.label: Meal option
elements.description: A rectangular shape representing a meal option, positioned to the right of the app screenshot.

elements.label: Meal option
elements.description: A rectangular shape representing a meal option, positioned slightly below the app screenshot.

elements.label: Install now
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad to encourage action.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby $4.99 Install now

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo text 'SnapMeal' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in white, positioned at the top right corner of the ad.
